notes.languageFallback: Default fallback is English when Hindi content is missing, except SSC CGL non-English sections where Hindi is mandatory.
notes.sscCglLanguageRule: SSC CGL requires content.en for every section. For non-English sections, content.hi is required. English section may remain English-only.
notes.hindiExplanation: If exam languageSupport includes hi, explanation.hi is strongly recommended.

explanation.en: 18 + 27 equals 45. Add ones place then tens place.
explanation.hi: 18 + 27 ka yog 45 hota hai. Pehle ones place, phir tens place jodiye.
